name: Captured Fox Kunoichi || IJN Shinano and Musashi
description:
[Deal with 2 Bound Foxes]

3 Scenarios: Vanilla (1-2) || Netori (3-4) || Make Your Own Scenario (5)

Description: Now as Kunoichi, Musashi and Shinano seem to be in a pickle as they're now entrapped in your room. The vanilla scenario is where the girls accidentally triggered traps in your room, but they're still your kunoichi and you as their lord. The Netori scenario is for when both girls are from another lord, but got captured while sneaking into your castle.

Series: Azur Lane

Artist: DISH | Dishwasher1910
creator: Chunter
